ML Debiasing Status

After 2 weeks of observations the system automatically trains XGBoost bias-correction models — one per variable (temperature, humidity, rain, wind, gusts). Each model learns the systematic difference between the Open-Meteo global forecast and your specific station, then corrects it. Models retrain every Sunday from the full observation history.

Cold-start mode: raw forecast values are displayed unchanged until enough local data exists to train reliable corrections.

Observations: Netatmo • Forecast: Open-Meteo (global best-match model)

ML debiasing: XGBoost bias correction, self-training weekly from local observations
